creator: ark@dudevich.dn.ua
text:
Created attachment 172141
dmesg with selected NVidia card AC power on

This model has two different video card Intel and Nvidia.
I can choose three variants in the BIOS (Intel, Nvidia or Nvidia Optimus).
My T530 can't boot with selected Nvidia card and AC power off.
If AC power is on - boot without problem.
I don't have problem with Intel card in  both variants (AC power on or off).
If AC power is turned off after the download stops the following lines:
usbus1: 480Mbps High Speed USB v2.0
usbus2: 480Mbps High Speed USB v2.0
ugen0.1: <0x8086> at usbus0
uhub0: <0x8086 XHCI root HUB, class 9/0, rev 3.00/1.00, addr 1> on usbus0
ugen1.1: <Intel> at usbus1
uhub1: <Intel EHCI root HUB, class 9/0, rev 2.00/1.00, addr 1> on usbus1
ugen2.1: <Intel> at usbus2
uhub2: <Intel EHCI root HUB, class 9/0, rev 2.00/1.00, addr 1> on usbus2
